div.div: status=succeeded is set ONLY server-side from the Razorpay webhook (AsyncJob reconciliation, idempotent; POST /me/payments requires Idempotency-Key). The client SDK result is advisory. Per-society Razorpay sub-merchant = provisioning config, not a table; no Webhook/Settlement entity — persisted outcome is Payment + ledger postings.

div.div: Offline payments: POST /charges/{id}/offline-payment {method: cash|cheque, amount, received_on, reference} → Receipt + Cash/Bank Book + Payment Ledger postings. Receipts are system-generated under Treasurer authority; GST-compliant format when GSTIN set; stored as a linked document on the ledger entry.
